title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Myrtle essential oils helps with cough because of its natural expectorant properties, which loosen and clear mucus from the airways, providing relief from congestion and hacking. The oil's antimicrobial compounds also help to combat underlying infections that can cause persistent coughing.
